stack.automationEngine: n8n (self-hosted or n8n Cloud — secrets only on Railway / n8n credentials store)
stack.aiClassification: DeepSeek API — routing, intent, urgency, language detect, PII redaction hints
stack.aiDraftPolish: OpenAI ChatGPT API — professional client-facing draft only after classification + policy gates
stack.sharedMemory: Neon Postgres — event_log + optional dedicated support_ticket_state (n8n or worker writes)
stack.orchestrationControl: BossMind — env kill-switches, deploy gates, this repo policy JSON + Neon audit rows

languages.notes: n8n: Language detect node or LLM; reply in detected language when confidence high; else English with short FR/AR disclaimer.

routing.notes: AI draft only; human approves before send.
Never auto-send; acknowledge receipt template only if lawyer-approved.
No auto-reply to avoid backscatter; optional internal Neon log only.

gmailTriggers.newMail: Gmail trigger node or Google Pub/Sub push to n8n webhook (preferred at scale)
gmailTriggers.replies: Thread ID continuity in n8n; store threadId in Neon
gmailTriggers.attachments: Save metadata + virus scan (Workspace) before LLM; never send attachment to model if policy forbids
gmailTriggers.urgent: Label INBOX + subject/body urgency classifier + SMS/slack optional
gmailTriggers.spam: Use Gmail spam + custom rules; do not train on client PII without consent

neonPayloadShape.piiNote: Prefer hashed email in logs; full email only in encrypted store or Gmail-native if policy allows.

antiLoop: Do not reply to no-reply addresses
Max 1 outbound per thread per 24h unless human override
Detect Out-of-Office headers and pause thread
antiDuplicate: Dedupe by Gmail message-id in Neon before send
antiHallucination: Ground replies with approved snippets + links to resumora.net/pricing and /support only
Refuse to invent order status without Stripe/session lookup in n8n
rateLimits: Respect Gmail API quotas; batch history fetch
killSwitches: BOSSMIND_SUPPORT_AI_EMERGENCY_STOP=1 — n8n IF node stops all auto-send
BOSSMIND_SUPPORT_AI_AUTO_SEND=0 — drafts only to approval queue

approvalDashboard.where: n8n UI (manual task / form) or separate low-code dashboard; not shipped in Resumora Next.js unless product approves new admin surface

neverCommit: Neon connection string with write access from untrusted CI

workspaceChromeNote: Chrome profile isolation is client-side only; mail automation is server-side (n8n). Do not mix personal Gmail OAuth into managed Chrome profiles.
